# services.awstats

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.awstats`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.awstats.configs` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of domains to collect stats for. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.domain` | `string` | The domain name to collect stats for. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.extraConfig` | `attribute set of string` | Extra configuration to be appended to awstats.${name}.conf. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.hostAliases` | `list of string` | List of aliases the site has. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.logFile` | `string` | The log file to be scanned. For mail, set this to `journalctl $OLD_CURSOR -u postfix.service \| ${pkgs.perl}/bin/perl ${pkgs.awstats.out}/share/awstats/tools/maillogconvert.pl standard \|` |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.logFormat` | `string` | The log format being used. For mail, set this to `%time2 %email %email_r %host %host_r %method %url %code %bytesd` |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.type` | `one of "mail", "web"` | The type of log being collected. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.webService.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable awstats web service. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.webService.hostname` | `string` | The hostname the web service appears under. |
| `services.awstats.configs.<name>.webService.urlPrefix` | `string` | The URL prefix under which the awstats pages appear. |
| `services.awstats.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The directory where awstats data will be stored. |
| `services.awstats.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable awstats, a real-time logfile analyzer. |
| `services.awstats.updateAt` | `null or string` | Specification of the time at which awstats will get updated. (in the format described by {manpage}`systemd.time(7)`) |
